name: Priya Sharma

assessment.approach_description: Used an event-sourced architecture instead of standard CRUD. Implemented CQRS pattern for read/write separation. Solution handles 10x the expected load.

side_projects.name: realtime-chat

bio: Self-taught backend developer. Started coding 2 years ago with zero CS background. Built and deployed 3 production systems. Active open source contributor.
resume_text: Backend Developer. 18 months at LocalPay Solutions building payment APIs handling 50k txns/day. Self-taught. Diploma from Govt Polytechnic. 12 GitHub repos, 847 commits last year. Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker.
